Name: You In Danger, Girl
Notes: Bubblegum with excellent drydown

Name: The Queen
Notes: Rose

Name: Art Of The Universe
Notes: sweet pear

Name: Myslf Absolu
Notes: beautiful vanilla and floral

Name: Myslf Parfum
Notes: floral forward

Name: Myslf EDP
Notes: powder and florals. very nice

Name: Aventish Red
Notes: not good performance

Name: Brackish Man Intense
Notes: heavier projection than OG

Name: Aventish
Notes: perfection

Name: F'eau Sauvage
Notes: very light but decent scent

Name: Gentlemen Society Ambree
Notes: light projection

Name: Gambit
Notes: held up at the gym. nice fresh, armoatic scent

Name: Bois Imperial EDP
Notes: masterfully blended woody nuclear frag with a perfect discoverable projection

Name: Oud- Intense
Notes: great starter oud for someone. just a touch of animalics with a well done oud accord.

Name: Ernest 1992
Notes: pine and cedar. classic style fragrance. decent performance

Name: Patchouli Mania
Notes: 2:1 ratio of Aventish and EP Patchouli Mania. The Patchouli is pretty strong. ill do a 3:1 next time

Name: Present Gambit (F7)
Notes: barely detectable

Name: The SHIT (Joop Homme)
Notes: nuclear, but not really that great

Name: Man Card (Gucci Pour Homme 2003)
Notes: nice blend of cedar, leather, pink pepper, orris, ginger and lemon

Name: Cosmopolitan Vintage (Dior Eau Sauvage)
Notes: vintage feel. slightly animalic. decent performance

Name: New York Intense
Notes: weird opening but strong BdP soon after. Great legs on it.

Name: Bet On Green (Polo Green)
Notes: 12 hours! Sits pretty close to the skin after a few hours. It smells good... nice and citrusy and fresh greens. for $20, its worth it and is very much like vintage green

Name: Oud of Ulya (Amouage Oud Ulya)
Notes: This smells excellent and comes together in about 20 minutes, but only lasted a couple of hours. It may need time to rest. I will revisit in the fall.

Name: Absolu Aventus
Notes: Top 3 for sure and this beautiful 70 degree evening at work is no exception! the smokey pineapple, earthy birch tar, and touch of sweetness is absolute perfection! While Mith Mystery and Poly Aventish are excellent inspirations, nothing can touch the king. This fragrances defines masculinity. It is being bumped to a perfect 10! I got 6 hours of great projection and about 4 more of a small scent bubble.

Name: Homme Intense 2025
Notes: Buttery iris which is first in class, but will take Prada L'Homme because DHI 2025 does not perform. I get about 2 hours projection. I would like to try an earlier batch.

Name: Jubilation XXV 2019 WMS11979-1
Notes: I am very disappointed with this batch. It's barely a skin scent at the 2 hour mark. the first 90 minutes are very sweet with blackberry and honey taking over. Some incense finally sneaks in, and then its gone.

Name: Jubilation XXV Man
Notes: I had to get that unpleasant experience off of my mind and applied the beautiful, full spectrum new batch on before bed. Now this is more like it! there isn't much sweetness to this one. The next time I wear Jubilation 25, ill layer them.

Name: Aventish Aqua
Notes: Nuclear performer with minimal application. Tropical and sweet with a slight masculine vibe. Too young for me. I was still in a scent bubble 18 hours later.

Name: Sultani
Notes: I needed something strong to mask the Aqua at 18 hours and 2 sprays of Sultani did not disappoint

Name: Best Citrus Ever (Henry Jacques Iros)
Notes: Very nice Neroli, Citrus and Vetiver in the opening. Its strong for a couple hours and then disappears.

Name: Aqua Odyssey
Notes: Right off the truck this smells incredible. It seems to draw inspiration from Aventus, but does its own thing. Its patchouli heavy and I love it. The smokey pineapple is there as well. This will be incredible in a month.

Name: Black Myth (Boadicea Hanuman)
Notes: Another tester right off the truck. Floral heavy and nuclear. Its a nice blend.

Name: His Sartorial (Penhaligon Sartorial)
Notes: This was surprisingly excellent. 12+ hours and smells prettt close to the Sartorial.

Name: Gambit
Notes: Clove is strong from the top. I perceive it as almonds, but luckily it passes soon and settles into a decent aromatic. The performance isn't that great and the scent is just okay.

Name: Invasion of the Royal Barbers (MDCI Invasion Barbarè & Creed BdP)
Notes: Strong start. I get a lot of the BdP citrus and oakmoss with a little of the Prada L'Homme of the Invasion. Id say its a 4:1 ratio BdP:MDCI. Its pretty damn good as is all of DUAs fougeres. They catch a lot of heat, but the masculine frags that I have tried from them are all excellent for the money!

Name: Allure Homme Édition Blanche
Notes: Creamy citrus like like lemon merengue pie. 4 hours of good projection and then a skin scent

Name: Man Card (Gucci Pour Homme 2003)
Notes: Clean, masculine inoffensive scent that just pops off the skin.

Name: For You, Sir!
Notes: There is definitely a vintage vibe to this fragrance. A touch of citrus balances out to some unfamiliar aromatics. It makes me want to dress in a double-breasted suit and wear my pinky ring. It gives off a gentlemen's projection just outside of a scent bubble. Is it good? fuhgedaboutit...

Name: Bois Imperial EDP
Notes: I started my temporary transfer to days with something woody and loud. This is some of Bisch's best work even with the akigalawood! We need more 4 seasons Woods! Its so fresh and clean smelling. Its up there with Royal Oud for sure.

Name: Herbes Troublantes
Notes: Right off the truck, this is a beautiful blend of orange and lemon with a little green. I don't get much musk until about 2 hours in and then the clean musk kicks in.

Name: BDC L'xclusiv
Notes: L'exclusif changes in the heat. I may have to adjust its Season setting. The drydown comes a lot quicker in the heat and the patchouli really shines. I didn't get much powder this wear either. This has been a significant change since my last wear.

Name: The Dreamer
Notes: The Dreamer has picked up some performance as it has sat. I got a good 3 hours of Imagination-like fresh, clean moderstle project. Not bad for $30! I love wearing this fragrance out of the shower. Its a temporary sublime scent bubble that disappears and allows you to wear something else.

Name: Sultani
Notes: Musk bomb so strong with only 2 sprays. Its a revitalizing fragrance so it was a mistake to wear it to bed. This is a get out of bed fragrance. As expected, I needed to scrub it off in the shower when I woke up to prepare for the days work wearing BdP.

Name: Bois de Portugal
Notes: I have a couple of different batches and there are differences in the citrus element of the scent, but the clean, barbershop drydown is equivalent. I want to try my luck with a '17 batch on this. I had about 5 hours strong projection today and then it came close to a personal bubble. I brought a decant, but I think I will just ride it out so that I can wear something else after work.

Name: L'Homme L'eau (PUIG)
Notes: Beautiful as always... fresh, clean and powdery with the buttery iris, but I think that I went noseblind. I just applied 10 more sprays... lets see. I woke up this morning and it was nuclear. I was noseblind.

Name: Bone Daddy
Notes: The benchmark freshie that lasts all day with minimal sprays. Fresh, powdery right out of the shower sports fragrance which includes some snake oil pheromones. Love this stuff!

Name: Sesame Shower
Notes: It smells like the notes read... a nutty cookie. It's quite delightful, but very feminine. The ingredients are high quality and the blend is fantastic. It turns into a typical musky feminine fragrance about 90 minutes in.

Name: Tonico Miele
Notes: Honey based lightly sweetened for the forst couple hours and then sits closer to the skin with the barbershop

Name: Dyed
Notes: Inked is a very interesting and unique scent. I have never smelled ink in a fragrance, but it is lifelike in this bottle. The mixture with the lime and charred wood is very creative. While summer might not be the best time to wear it, I am happy that I gor to experience it in the heat.

Name: Profundo
Notes: Headed to an outdoor basketball tournament so I chose this bad boy. It's nuckear like the EDT from the early 2000's. This is my favorite flanker.

Name: Sartorial
Notes: Left Arm- much richer and luxurious. It has stronger projection. Its more animalic.

Name: His Sartorial (Penhaligon Sartorial)
Notes: Right Arm- Not even close at any point but still good

Name: A Thousand Miles
Notes: Very citrusy and the lemongrass greens it up. Its very refreshing and unique.

Name: Sauvage Elixir 03-2022 2C05
Notes: This does so much better in the heat. My batch is one of the forst batches and I paid extra because of the decline in performance in recent batches. I wasn't impressed with longevity in the winter, but the issue was heat. one spray dominates a room for a good 3 hours until the excellect spiced dominant scent moves more in to a personal bubble. This fragrance is a masterpiece! It ended up lasting all day long!

Name: Royal Oud (2010)
Notes: Smooth and slightly sweet. perfectly blended

Name: Royal Oud
Notes: Much sharper than the 2010. It projects more and is fine with 2 sprays in the summer.

Name: Gentleman EDT Intense
Notes: The top is very aromatic. After about an hour, the iris starts to blend in better. Its sharp and moderately strong. I had excellent projection for about 4 hours and then it moved in to a powdery scent bubble for a total of 12.

Name: Aventish Pink
Notes: I am testing this out with a couple spritzes. its very feminine, but I love it! the Bubblegum really pops and the solar element shines.

Name: Bone Daddy
Notes: Blast of powdery freshness with monstrous projection!

Name: Certo
Notes: Smells like springtime in the woods. A light incense vibe and something green with some well blended leather.

Name: Sartorial
Notes: It was a busy day at work and this didn't blow me away like it usually does. $180 bottle that was a priority is now pending. I wanna couple more wears before I decide.

Name: Faux du Jour
Notes: Rough opening. Lasts 30 minutes.

Name: Fougère Nouvelle
Notes: Smells good but performance is terrible.

Name: Imaginary (LV Imagination)
Notes: Powdery florals thats nuclear. This stuff is so great!

Name: Aventus Cologne
Notes: Another busy day. I smelled good all shift. The key is a few sprays on your shirt with this one.

Name: Aventish Red
Notes: This is starting to wakeup. Great Aventus drydown. I actually smelled the top this time. Another month. I will grab a bottle next time.

Name: Aventish Blue
Notes: This one might be ready. Its fire!

Name: Bal d'Afrique EDP
Notes: Out of the gate, its not as sharp as Absolu. Its a little less feminine for sure. I get a nutty/woody vibe off it it. I can tell that its not going to last. It does smell pretty good though.

Name: Hacivat
Notes: I am curious if I even received the right stuff. This is horrid and gone quickly!

Name: Pardon
Notes: Rich and decadent... Its a chococlately oud thats a little medicinal at the top. Its rather strong and obnoxious, just like the brand. An hour in, the medicinal top fades and you are left with a strong, chocolately patchouli. The cinnamon has been there for the entire ride is still prevalent.

Name: Singular
Notes: First wear and new scent. It has pretty good performance. it smells fresh and clean. not bad for $15.

Name: Sartorial
Notes: I am considering purchasing a bottle. This didn't perform as well as I would have hoped

Name: His Sartorial (Penhaligon Sartorial)
Notes: Much better performance than the OG, a little more animalic, and less fresh.

Name: Sartorial
Notes: Going for another afternoon run. I have 4ml left to decide if I need a bottle or the DUA will scratch the itch.

Name: Aventish Blue
Notes: Nuclear and lasted through the gym and all night long. This is ready to wear.

Name: L'Homme Intense (PUIG (April 9, 2019) )
Notes: Still needs some time after shipping but its not as powdery and it has much more iris. It's really nice however I expect its performance to increase substantially.

Name: Viking Cologne
Notes: Not happy with the performance.

Name: Polo Green Cosmair
Notes: Fresh cut grass. This brings back fond memories of high school.

Name: Aventish Blue
Notes: Fruity, slightly sweet with a little bit of woods.

Name: Paradigme
Notes: Went to Sephora and tried out the new Parfum on my right arm. The amber woods were too cloying. The EDP is fantastic. its bright bergoment and citrus top us really nice. it started to drydown when I got to my car and the beautiful Prada powder surfaces front and center. I may get a bottle.

Name: Oaxaca
Notes: Smells like Mexico. green peppers, cilantro and lime

Name: Racer-X
Notes: Beautiful sporty lime all day long

Name: Blockade
Notes: Tropical freshie thats not very sweet. High quality mango blend. Unfortunately it doesnt perform. Hopefully there is a solid inspiration out there made right.

Name: Gary's Den
Notes: Right off the truck, this is really good. Its not as powdery as I hoped that it would be, but it had a really nice iris.

Name: Queening
Notes: Really nice powdery vanilla snd coconut. Its giving me sunscreen vibes. I dig it.

Name: Brackish Man Intense
Notes: Excellent fougere slightlt animalic with a gentlemen's projection

Name: Aventus
Notes: I received a carded sample of this and am blown away by both smell and performance. i need a large decant of this for sure.
